# Sujeet Jaiswal — Engineering Notes

> Personal blog and portfolio of Sujeet Jaiswal, a Principal Software Engineer
> writing deep technical guides on frontend architecture, web performance,
> distributed systems, and system design.

Built on `@pagesmith/core` + `@pagesmith/site`.

## Sections

- [Articles](https://sujeet.pro/articles): In-depth
  long-form technical guides covering frontend internals, web performance,
  JavaScript runtime details, and system design scenarios.
- [Blogs](https://sujeet.pro/blogs): Shorter
  commentary, notes, and project retrospectives.
- [Projects](https://projects.sujeet.pro/): Cross-referenced portfolio at
  `projects.sujeet.pro` listing open source tools and libraries.

## Series highlights

- Critical Rendering Path: DOM, CSSOM, layout, paint, and compositing.
- JavaScript Runtime Internals: V8, event loops, rendering pipelines.
- System Design Scenarios: End-to-end design exercises with trade-offs.
- Web Performance: Measurement, optimization, and infrastructure tuning.

## Contact

- GitHub: https://github.com/sujeet-pro
- LinkedIn: https://www.linkedin.com/in/sujeetkrjaiswal/
